//: Azure-backed local-dev overlay. Activated automatically when
ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Trial (use the 'Trial' launch profile or set the
Naming: 'Trial' matches the integration branch in our branching contract
(feature → trial → main → release). This profile is what you run locally
while iterating on changes destined for the trial branch — Azure-backed
dependencies, real Google OAuth + JWT, all the production muscles minus
Secrets policy: this committed file holds NO secrets and NO tenant
identifiers (placeholders only). Real values go in either:
* Key Vault — auto-pulled when KeyVault:Uri is non-empty (Program.cs
wires AddAzureKeyVault with DefaultAzureCredential, which uses your
`az login` locally and Managed Identity in ACA).
DISABLE_AUTH is intentionally NOT set — real Google OAuth + JWT stay on so
this profile exercises the production auth path.
